summary: Iteration 45: Tested Google Sheets integration hardening features (P0 backend + P1 admin frontend). All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend Portfolio Sync page loads with new UI components (Sheet Template Center, Sheet Validation Panel) without crash/blank. Validation returns graceful not-configured payload when service account is missing.

issues: Console warning: Each child in a list should have a unique 'key' prop - cosmetic, doesn't break functionality

passed_tests: POST /api/admin/sheets/validate-sheet returns 200 with graceful payload when not configured (configured=false, checklist, required_service_account_fields)
GET /api/admin/sheets/download-template/inventory-sync returns 200 with CSV containing Turkish headers (Tarih, Oda Tipi, Fiyat, Kontenjan)
GET /api/admin/sheets/download-template/reservation-writeback returns 200 with CSV containing write-back headers (Kayit Tipi, Misafir Ad Soyad, etc.)
POST /api/admin/sheets/connections (REST alias) creates connection with validation_status='pending_configuration' when not configured
DELETE /api/admin/sheets/connections/{hotel_id} successfully removes connection and returns deleted=true
GET /api/admin/sheets/templates returns downloadable_templates with inventory-sync and reservation-writeback
GET /api/admin/sheets/config returns configured=false with required_service_account_fields when no credentials
Admin Portfolio Sync page (/app/admin/portfolio-sync) loads without crash/blank
Sheet Template Center component renders with download buttons, required fields, checklist
Sheet Validation Panel component renders with form inputs (Sheet ID, Tab, Writeback Tab)
Sheet validation form interaction: entering sheet_id and clicking validate shows 'Doğrulama beklemede' status
Connections table displays existing connections (4 rows found)
New Connection wizard opens correctly with hotel list dropdown
Existing test suite test_admin_sheets_management.py passes (5/5 tests)
critical_code_review_comments: All new endpoints follow proper error handling patterns
Graceful degradation when service account not configured - returns helpful payload instead of error
Template download endpoints correctly set Content-Disposition headers for file download
REST-style /connections alias properly creates pending_configuration records
Frontend components (SheetTemplateCenter, SheetValidationPanel) use proper data-testid attributes for testability

success_rate.backend: 100% (all 5 pytest tests passed, all 7 manual API tests passed)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 45 tested Google Sheets integration P0 backend hardening + P1 admin frontend management UI. Service account is NOT configured in this preview environment - all tests verified graceful not-configured behavior. validate-sheet returns configured=false with checklist and required fields. Template downloads work. REST alias POST /connections creates pending_configuration records. Frontend loads all new components (SheetTemplateCenter, SheetValidationPanel) correctly. Minor console warning about unique keys in ConnectionsTable - cosmetic only.
notes: No real Google Service Account credentials provided - expected behavior verified: graceful payload with configured=false, checklist items, required fields. Live Google API calls not tested as service account not configured.
